title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.1520 - Notice of changes
text:
376.1520.  Notice of changes. — Each discount medical plan organization required to be registered pursuant to this section shall provide the director at least thirty days' advance notice of any change in the discount medical plan organization's name, address, principal business address, or mailing address.
(L. 2007 H.B. 818 merged with S.B. 66) 
Effective 8-28-07 (S.B. 66); 1-01-08 (H.B. 818)
